title: Senior Marcomms Executive/ Marcomms Executive
description:
We are looking for a driven and proactive Senior Marcomms Executive/ Marcomms Executive to join our growing team. The ideal candidate should be able to work in a fast-paced environment and contribute actively to driving effective marketing campaigns.

You will be responsible for developing campaigns and managing all marketing efforts, including but not limited to the following:

Job Description:

  • Develop, plan, and execute brand and marketing strategies aimed at existing and new customers to increase brand loyalty, sales, and foot traffic across locations
  • Explore, establish, and maintain partnership opportunities, including in-house partners, malls, banks, and other relevant partners
  • Oversee and managepartnership campaign deliverables, including post-campaign evaluation and recommendations
  • Manage and maintain food delivery and reservation platforms
  • Oversee and manage the membership programme
  • Develop marketing campaigns and partnerships to support membership growth
  • Formulate engagement plans to acquire new members
  • Review feedback from the member base and initiate improvements to enhance acquisition programmes
  • Support and coordinate with the marketing team to execute tactical campaigns for membership acquisition
  • Prepare regular reports on membership acquisition activities for evaluation and improvement
  • Assist in art direction for print and digital collaterals, photography, and in-store visuals
    Perform ad hoc duties as assigned
  • May be required to work on some weekends

Job Requirements:

  • Candidate must possess at least a Degree in Marketing, Mass Communications, or a related discipline (or equivalent)
  • At least 1–3 years of relevant working experience in a related field
  • Familiar with and have good knowledge of customer relationship management (CRM) systems
  • Strong sense of responsibility, detail-oriented, and able to work independently as well as in a team
  • Able to work in a fast-paced environment with strong problem-solving and multitasking skills
  • Preferably able to start work immediately or within a short notice period

postedCompany.description:
Dian Xiao Er symbolizes a pit-stop for travelers (customers) to rest and replenish their energy fully before setting off to continue their hectic journeys again. Dian Xiao Er not only provides to the travelers a place of warmth, satisfaction and happiness as they indulge in the delectable dishes, it is also a place for them to interact and build relationships with one another. Dian Xiao Er also symbolizes an element of blessing and fellowship as everyone is brought together in Dian Xiao Er.

The ambience at Dian Xiao Er is intentionally planned to be rustic and raw with the careful selection of materials to complement the freshness of the herbal roast ducks which are prepared and roasted in the display kitchen daily. Customers can expect to experience a choice of dining ambience varying from dining inside a traditional Chinese inn to dining inside a rustic timber shed at the foot of a stone cliff.

Regardless of a society’s progression, the purpose of a meal remains multifaceted. On one hand, it is a social occasion; a reason to bring people together at a single place and enjoy each other’s company. On the other hand, it is a time for animated and passionate discussion amongst people holding all-embracing views across many different topics and interests. It is also a time when the body receives necessary sustenance and when the hosts enjoy opening their environment to close friends and associates, as well as an opportunity to integrate new members into that community. No matter what the reason may be, Dian Xiao Er is your pit-stop for all occasions.
postedCompany.name: DIAN XIAO ER GROUP PTE. LTD.
